{{CargoOrgan
|name=Hyperspectral Iris
|type=Bionic
|rank=blue
|id=10658
|idx=15
|description=The iris shows different colors under lights of different wavelengths. The iris can even capture minute objects under high wavelengths.
|skill=Summon a Rotating Light Blade, dealing DMG equal to 154% of ATK!
|hp=880
|def=103
|atk=79
|rush=147
|gene1=During exploration, Wind DMG +60
|gene2=In explorations, {race} RUSH +20
|gene3=For Round 1, CRIT DMG +5%
|gene7=For Round 1, CRIT DMG +5% (Awakened)
|}}
